# Cqm1_Phylogenetics
2026 cqm1 &amp; ace2 gene tree project. Includes IDX sequences from SLC and sequences retrieved from recently published whole genomes

BLAST search against Culex (and some outgroups) genomes using this sequence:
>KY929304.1 Culex quinquefasciatus isolate Trombay binary toxin receptor protein (Cqm1) gene, complete cds


aligned fasta used when whole query had a good match. Complete sequence FASTA downloaded when there was extra intron between close matches that seemed to be part of the same sequence (idCulPipi1.1 alt).
